g.text: DQ Rule Authoring -- End-to-End Data Flow
Databricks | Model Serving Endpoint | Delta Lake | Unity Catalog | Python | Turn 1: SUGGEST >> Turn 2: APPLY
Databricks App | DQ Backend App (Python UC Functions)
TURN 1 -- SUGGEST: User asks what DQ checks apply to a table
[Cache HIT -- suggestions exist for this schema version]
[Cache MISS -- new table or schema changed]
generate checks from schema + data contract
"Type: Apply 1 and 2 | Apply ALL | Save custom rule"
TURN 2 -- APPLY: User selects rules and saves
WRITE intent: Genie calls UC Function Tool (dq_author_rule).
UC Function runs in DQ Backend App under a Service Principal
with INSERT permission on anomaly_check_config. L1 >> L2 handoff.
[for each selected check (id=1: NULL_RATE, id=2: VOLUME_ANOMALY)]
approval request to PO + Tech Lead
